log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Locathah — Winged Striker.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Locathah — Winged Striker.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:5+3=8 vs AC 15] MISS.
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Locathah — Winged Striker.
→ Locathah — Winged Striker: DEX save [d20:17+6=23 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Locathah — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):18+1=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):10+1=11 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):11+1=12 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):14+1=15 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 4/5 targets affected.

REASONING: Ally charmed by Hypnotic Pattern! Shaking Cult Fanatic awake.
ACTION: Shakes Cult Fanatic awake! Charmed + Incapacitated removed.
